new_sources_to_consider.rationale: Northern Journal (Nathaniel Herz) broke the Stak Energy North Slope story on May 13 and is syndicated by ADN and Alaska Beacon. Credible, Alaska-focused, independent. High signal for infrastructure/energy beat.
Primary regional outlet for Southeast Alaska; published Sealaska/Tlingit AI translator story (May 21, 2026) first. Subscription-based, established. Paywalled stories may be unfetchable.
Fairbanks Daily News-Miner covers UAF and Interior Alaska closely; published detailed reporting on SB 287 and ANLC legislative hearings.
National Fisherman produces well-sourced Alaska fisheries and technology reporting consistently. Useful for Beat C (AI in fisheries, NOAA, electronic monitoring).
Data Center Dynamics covered Stak Energy North Slope proposal in technical depth before ADN pickup. Useful early-signal source for AI infrastructure stories.
